title: Xenial Slovakian Ackee Dumplings
description: Fresh, pillowy dumplings that combine the sweet, buttery flavor of ackee with a traditional Slovakian twist, perfect for midnight cravings. These vegan dumplings are light, airy, and comforting.
instructions: Drain and gently pat dry the ackee fruit into small bite-sized pieces.
In a saucepan, heat the vegetable broth to 75°C.
Whisk the flour, potato starch, salt, and pepper together in a bowl.
Slowly pour the hot broth into the dry ingredients while stirring vigorously to avoid lumps.
Add the ackee pieces, dill, and minced garlic to the dough, mixing until evenly incorporated.
Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat, then drop spoonfuls of the dumpling mixture into the pan.
Cover the skillet and cook the dumplings for 8 minutes until they are puffed and golden.
Remove the dumplings and serve hot with a drizzle of coconut oil or a sprinkle of fresh dill.
